  theorem list_set_flatten {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {elt : α}
    {idx : Nat} {hidx : idx < l.length}  :
    (l.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten
    = (l.set idx l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx (List.map List.length l)).sum + l1.length) elt := by
      induction idx generalizing l l1 with
      | zero =>
        cases l with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl =>
          simp
          <;>
          induction hd <;> simp_all [List.minus, List.append_assoc, List.map, List.take, List.sum] <;>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.take, List.sum, List.map] <;>
          try { omega } <;>
          try { ring_nf at * <;> omega }
      | succ idx' HR =>
        induction l with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl =>
          simp_all [List.length]
          <;>
          simp_all [List.get, List.set, List.map, List.take, List.sum]
          <;>
          try { omega }
          <;>
          try {
            simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.take, List.sum, List.map]
            <;>
            try { omega }
            <;>
            try { ring_nf at * <;> omega }
          }
          <;>
          try {
            simp_all [List.append_assoc]
            <;>
            simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.take, List.sum, List.map]
            <;>
            try { omega }
            <;>
            try { ring_nf at * <;> omega }
          }
          <;>
          try {
            simp_all [List.append_assoc]
            <;>
            simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.take, List.sum, List.map]
            <;>
            try { omega }
            <;>
            try { ring_nf at * <;> omega }

            simp_all [List.append_assoc]
            <;>
